response.overview: The story follows Hani (Mimi Lana), who disguises herself as a politician's daughter-in-law to uncover secrets, drama and domestic problems of the second wives and secret lovers of famous VIPs living in the exclusive "Villa Kristal" condominium. "Villa Kristal" is inhabited by the elite class along with their second wives and secret mistresses. In search of sensational material for her novel, Hani (Mimi Lana), a naive aspiring novelist, discovers that Rose (Mawar Rashid), the young wife of a famous Islamic scholar, is a resident there. Hani disguises herself as a politician's daughter-in-law and attempts to expose all the scandals, drama and domestic problems of Rose and her friends, Angel (Jasmine Suraya Chin) and Diana (Tiz Zaqyah). Stepping into the world of "Second Women", Hani becomes entangled in a murder investigation of a wealthy property tycoon, Idris (Tony Eusoff), which has changed the lives of him and the other women at Villa Kristal.
response.title: Villa Kristal
